scores.notes: No actual code is shown — only a prose walkthrough/description, making it impossible to verify correctness directly. From the description: correct use of event.workload, add_layer(combine=True), replan(), and self.config. However, relation data is read from 'remote unit's relation data' (unit databag) rather than relation.data[relation.app] (app databag) as required by gold standard and modern database interfaces. The get_checks(level=READY) call likely needs ops.pebble.CheckLevel.READY rather than bare READY. CheckStatus.DOWN may or may not exist as described. Overall the described approach is mostly correct but has inaccuracies around relation data access pattern.
